title: Tamil Nadu government formation: IUML denies reports of support to Vijay’s TVK
description: “We have been part of the DMK alliance for several decades and there is no question of leaving it. If Mr. Vijay needs support, he should approach DMK president M.K. Stalin, since he, too, has urged the Governor to take steps to expedite formation of a new government,” Kader Mohideen told The Hindu.
